spec_match.rationale: The rainbow chord now uses a valid hsl(calc((var(--i) - 1) / var(--n) * 360deg) ...) formula in active CSS.

interactive.rationale: The add/remove/restage controls still rebuild all four sibling-driven scenes and the repaired chord colors rebalance with the count.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page claim that choreography and color are driven by sibling functions now matches the repaired rainbow chord.

edge_cases.rationale: The existing support check continues to identify browsers without sibling-index() support.

references.rationale: The page includes the required ChromeStatus and CSS Values tree-counting links.

design_system.rationale: The repaired active style keeps the existing token-based surfaces, borders, and support states.

summary: The stagger orchestra no longer has a corrupted rainbow chord background formula; all four scenes now render their sibling-driven styling paths.
